articles.title: Notion killing Skiff-influenced email app since most users use AI agents instead
articles.content: Notion is "going all in on using agents to run your inbox."
articles.titleZh: 杀死受Skiff影响的电子邮件应用程序的概念，因为大多数用户使用人工智能代理
articles.contentZh: 概念是“全力以赴使用代理来运行您的收件箱。”

articles.title: One-two punch delivered in global operation disrupts cybercrime "assembly line"
articles.content: "Operation Endgame" simultaneously disrupts two widely used crime tools.
articles.titleZh: 在全球运营中交付的两拳颠覆了网络犯罪“装配线”
articles.contentZh: “结局行动”同时扰乱了两种广泛使用的犯罪工具。

articles.title: White House drastically shortens deadline for dropping quantum-vulnerable crypto
articles.content: Order warns of national security risks if post-quantum cryptography isn't adopted in time.
articles.titleZh: 白宫大幅缩短放弃易受量子攻击的加密货币的截止日期
articles.contentZh: 如果未及时采用后量子加密技术，命令将警告国家安全风险。

articles.title: Oracle’s 21,000 layoffs help drive its debt-fueled AI investments
articles.content: Oracle is spending billions on data center infrastructure to support AI.
articles.titleZh: 甲骨文的21,000次裁员有助于推动其以债务为动力的人工智能投资
articles.contentZh: 甲骨文正在花费数十亿美元用于数据中心基础设施，以支持人工智能。

articles.title: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
articles.content: Amazon’s Prime Day is now in its third day, and whether you’re looking for a new pair of wireless earbuds or a smartwatch, there’s a good chance you’ll find a discount. The Apple Watch Series 11 has already dropped to a new low price, while the AirPods Pro 3 are discounted to $179. With Apple […]
articles.titleZh: 今年苹果产品的Prime Day优惠是我见过的最好的
articles.contentZh: 亚马逊的Prime Day现已进入第三天，无论您是在寻找一副新的无线耳机还是智能手表，您都很有可能会找到折扣。Apple Watch Series 11已经降至新的低价，而AirPods Pro 3的折扣为$ 179。使用Apple […]

articles.title: Android 17’s new foldable gaming mode could make flippy phones more fun
articles.content: Android 17 is getting a dedicated gaming mode for foldables that will put a virtual gamepad with touch controls on half of your screen to theoretically make it easier to play games. With foldable gaming mode, which is set to launch in the coming months, the virtual controller emulates physical button presses at a system […]
articles.titleZh: Android 17的全新可折叠游戏模式可以让轻便手机更有趣
articles.contentZh: Android 17正在获得专用的可折叠游戏模式，该模式将在一半的屏幕上放置带有触摸控制的虚拟游戏手柄，理论上可以更轻松地玩游戏。在可折叠游戏模式下，虚拟控制器将在未来几个月内推出，模拟系统上的物理按钮按下[…]
